title: Indulgent Norwegian Egg Pancakes
description: A fresh, fluffy post-workout Norwegian pancake made with shortening and poached eggs, halal-friendly and bursting with flavor.
instructions: Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
Whisk milk, eggs, and vanilla extract together until smooth.
Add wet mixture to dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add a small pat of shortening.
Pour a thin layer of batter into the skillet and cook until bubbles form, about 2 minutes.
Flip the pancake and cook until golden, about 1 minute.
Repeat with remaining batter to make a total of 3 pancakes.
Fill a saucepan with 50 ml water, bring to a simmer, and add one poached egg per pancake.
Cook poached eggs for 3 minutes until whites set but yolks remain runny.
Place the poached egg on each pancake and serve immediately.
